title: Kinetic Index Motion
subtitle: Motion language for a digital culture festival.
description: A motion toolkit translating the festival identity into title cards, venue screens, social loops, and speaker transitions.

blocks.text: The festival needed motion assets that could feel alive while remaining easy for a small production team to update during programming changes.

blocks.caption: Storyboard frames for transitions and speaker cards.

steps.title: Motion Principles
steps.description: Defined timing, easing, and repeatable transition moves tied to the core identity grid.

steps.title: Template Build
steps.description: Created editable compositions for speaker names, dates, venue screens, and social loops.

steps.title: Production Guide
steps.description: Documented export settings and replacement rules for fast event-week changes.

items.label: Motion templates
items.description: Reusable compositions for live and social formats.

items.label: Aspect ratios
items.description: Venue screens, reels, stories, web banners, and square posts.

items.label: Loop duration
items.description: Default pace for ambient venue assets.
